html:
Exclusive to:
See also: Weight

The Fish Scale-O-Matic is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them.

Players can submit a Fish to the Fish Scale-O-Matic to display its Weight. If the new Fish is heavier than the current Fish, the new Fish takes its place and the old one is discarded. Examining the Fish Scale-O-Matic gives the name of the player who caught the Fish.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Decorator's Collection
Seaworthy Scale
What waits to be weighed'neath the waves?

Trivia

  • The Fish Scale-O-Matic was introduced in the Hook, Line, and Inker update.
  • The Fish Scale-O-Matic displays the fisher's name. If the fish falls from a mob or structure, it is indicated instead.

Gallery

  • A burnt Fish Scale-O-Matic.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Fish Scale-O-Matic
"Show off your prized catch."
Object Info
Perk
Expose Weight of fishes.
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Crafting
×4 ×2 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"trophyscale_fish"
Exclusive to:
See also: Weight
“I wonder how my catch of the day will measure up!”
–Wilson, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“Who cares about weighing some dumb fish?”
–Willow, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“Is scale to measure mightiness of fish!”
–Wolfgang, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“If my fish was as heavy as my heart, I'd surely win.”
–Wendy, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“A FRIVOLOUS DISTRACTION... I MUST WIN”
–WX-78, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“A place to display only the largest aquatic specimens.”
–Wickerbottom, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“Think it's time for some fishin', eh?”
–Woodie, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“Perhaps I might reign again... as the king of fishing!”
–Maxwell, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“I will stand victorious!”
–Wigfrid, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“Woah! We should find a big fish to put in there!”
–Webber, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“Perhaps I will try my luck?”
–Warly, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“Glub Glub holder”
–Wormwood, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“A challenge, huh?”
–Winona, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“For a fish it must be quite ideal, to be a prize and not a meal!”
–Wortox, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“This good home for fish!”
–Wurt, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“Just wait, that biggest fish badge will be mine!”
–Walter, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
“That's quite an extravagant fishbowl.”
–Wanda, examining an empty Fish Scale-O-Matic.
The Fish Scale-O-Matic is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them.
Players can submit a Fish to the Fish Scale-O-Matic to display its Weight. If the new Fish is heavier than the current Fish, the new Fish takes its place and the old one is discarded. Examining the Fish Scale-O-Matic gives the name of the player who caught the Fish.

Tóm tắt

Fish Scale-O-Matic là một Cấu trúc khả chế dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them.
